Peter,
Jon Tester continues to show that he is putting partisan politics first, America second, and veterans dead last.
In order to stand with Chuck Schumer and against America, Jon Tester engaged in a despicable smear campaign against President Trump’s pick to lead the VA, Dr. Ronny Jackson, and then voted against the most qualified leader for the CIA, Gina Haspel.
Jon Tester would rather smear a decorated doctor and veteran, and negatively affect the VA and CIA in the name of party politics than stand with President Trump and America.
**As a Montanan, I know we deserve better than Jon Tester. We deserve a man like Troy Downing.**
But if we want to dethrone Jon Tester, Troy needs our help.
**Please remember to vote for or return your absentee ballot for Troy Downing on Tuesday, June 5th.**
Troy has fought for our freedoms and values. But now we need to fight for him.
When you vote for a combat veteran, it helps our veterans. When you vote for a businessman, it helps Montana. When you vote for a proven conservative, it helps America.
I’m proud to stand with my brother-in-arms, Troy Downing, and I hope you will too.
Thank you,
Robert J. O’Neill
Former U.S. Navy SEAL

name: Trevor Bernardo
subject: Get Out The Vote in Truckee
body:
Hi everyone,

We have today and tomorrow before voting ends. We have worked incredibly hard until now, talking with voters and getting the word out about Jessica, now we have to make sure that we Get Out The Vote for Jessica in these last two days and we can use your help.

Our Office in Truckee is open 9am to 9pm today and 9am to 8pm tomorrow with phone banking and canvassing shifts from 9-12, 12-3, 3-6 and 6-9. Additionally we have two events with Jessica herself today in Kings Beach and in our Truckee Office.

The Sierra Sun is coming to our phone bank tonight at 5:30 at our Truckee Office and we want to ensure that we show the strength and support that Jessica has in Truckee to everyone else.

There are two flyers attached to this email outlining our canvass launch in Kings Beach and Phone Bank tonight at our office. Please RSVP to [samantha@morse4congress.com](mailto:samantha@morse4congress.com) to let me know which event you can come to.

Thank you for all of your hard work and let's make sure we finish strong!

In Solidarity,

\--

Trevor Bernardo
Field Director

(864) 764-2618
[trevor@morse4congress.com](mailto:trevor@morse4congress.com)

name: The White House
subject: President Trump’s 500 days of American greatness
body:
Your 1600 Daily:
| | [](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=1eda90d189804152ea2df2e48e750ee97f53b61a99959597754f8ffd7a3006efd57c9443f87ac103ab7e410f9c59b82d0905b742894e48c3) The White House • June 4, 2018
## The Day Ahead
| • | President Donald J. Trump will meet with Klaus Schwab, the founder and Executive Chairman of the World Economic Forum in Switzerland.
---|---
• | Vice President Mike Pence will address a reception with friends of the Organization of American States at the White House. [Watch live at 8 p.m. ET. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=1eda90d189804152433c4a2c79d689c97da78bdf36e726652380238c90ba6155d0f262faaa7b48b8b5fd4b838ec379701c8d05f0ca958917)

---
|

## President Trump's 500 days of American greatness
**Historic achievements underscore President Trump's 500th day in office**. Since January of last year, President Trump has strengthened American leadership, security, prosperity, and accountability. The results speak for themselves, both domestically and on the world stage.
**The U.S. economy is booming**. Nearly 3 million jobs have been created since President Trump took office, with manufacturing and construction job growth at their highest marks in nearly a decade. Unemployment has dropped to 3.8 percent--its lowest level since the beginning of the 21st century.
**America's communities are safer**. Despite limited resources and obstruction from Congress, President Trump has worked to take control of our border and enforce our immigration laws. The Administration has cracked down on the import and distribution of illegal drugs, and it worked with Central American partners to file charges against 4,000 members of MS-13 in 2017 alone.
**The United States is winning once again abroad**. America has worked with international allies to decimate ISIS, and the President's leadership has contributed to the return of 17 Americans held overseas.
[See more of President Trump's accomplishments, 500 days and counting. ](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=1eda90d1898041521fb92fb2536079b79fe759f30f7a7a5781a9d96b550e838c645bddd3883c6c7e993e8d1d9f5af3625f3967f9139bcea2)
---
|

## A letter from Kim Jong Un
**On Friday, a senior North Korean official traveled to the White House**. After meetings with Secretary of State Mike Pompeo in New York, Vice Chairman Kim Yong Chol delivered a letter to President Trump from North Korean leader Kim Jong Un regarding a planned summit June 12 in Singapore.
**"June 12th, we'll be in Singapore**. It will be a beginning. I don't say and I've never said it happens in one meeting," President Trump said. "This was a very good meeting. Don't forget, this was a meeting where a letter was given to me by Kim Jong Un, and that letter was a very nice letter."
[Watch President Trump address reporters after the meeting.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=1eda90d189804152dbf791ef35e8d553698cac0e9411f6fed3471681892878b23deef628753bdee40d3ab938fb5443b64bc7bbde67bfda41)
**More** : [Read the President's full comments on North Korea.](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=1eda90d18980415298a74a78333745c935dfcbf517c4db8ed6e01908bae0a6f74033913f5044c134a7cc51aee139c7313deda2c0314d8c2d)

---
|

## Photo of the Day
Official White House Photo by Shealah Craighead
**President Donald J. Trump is presented with a letter from Chairman Kim Jong Un by North Korean envoy Kim Yong Chol** | June 1, 2018

[Privacy Policy](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=1eda90d189804152e12d3f367a9faf1b17defb14a9b1daf332a37eb64fc9a766a517801f30e1fe553e19a526dc0da6ff47eaea7069899baf) | [Contact the White House](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/?qs=1eda90d189804152732f767c09c0f86b5c33c788ebd92f5ca835ffd2231601c31ed788cf16631e4ca0642f0c6abd3334f9ed5806ac20539a) | [Unsubscribe](https://click.mail.whitehouse.gov/unsub_center.aspx?qs=d453c42a6560d1d4d119f188ef3462cd7201a777952b10ef17c101d9be8bf5e1bfef6029c8729959b36ef43d77c39dc00324144766521c92935929b146eb39b7)
---

name: Painter For Minnesota
subject: Richard stands up for our values at the DFL Convention!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Painter Minnesota
body:
| [ ](http://www.painterminnesota.com/?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_convention&n=1)
---
Friend -- On Friday, Richard took the stage at the Minnesota DFL State Convention and stood up to corruption in politics. He fired up the delegates by doing what no other candidate was prepared to do: speak honestly about the problems facing this country. Richard’s speech highlighted exactly why he is the ideal candidate to advocate on behalf of Minnesotans and concerned citizens throughout the country. In his speech, he condemned the rampant and insidious corruption poisoning politics:
* “The Supreme Court has torn apart our Constitution by bestowing on corporations a ‘free speech’ right to **bribe** office holders, [and allowing] foreign adversaries to **infiltrate** our social media before elections and **funnel money** to dark money organizations.”
* “The system is corrupt to its core and represents monied interests rather than the people. And it is here that I will draw a line in the sand. We must now and henceforth say “no more!”

He supported single-payer healthcare, and denounced the special interests that prevent it from being a reality:
* “Why don’t we have [single-payer healthcare]? Because insurance companies, drug companies, medical device companies, and corporate health care providers funnel millions into political campaigns through PACS and super PACs, host fundraisers at the CEO’s home for senators and pay K-Street lobbyists while members of Congress own their stock. They make sure we **never** have a single payer insurer capable of negotiating down health care costs to where they are in the rest of the world.”

And he was the **only candidate** willing to stand up to big-money lobbyists trying to exploit Minnesota’s boundary waters:
* “Here at home Minnesota’s Boundary Waters and Canoe area Wilderness and the Duluth watershed are threatened with massive pollution from sulfide mining. And who will own these mines? Minnesotans? Americans? **Of course not**. “
* “Do we want . . . corrupt men running a sulfide mine in Minnesota, pouring their pollution into our waterways, employing a few hundred Minnesotans at low wages and taking the riches for themselves? I say heck no.”
* “Why do so many Minnesota politicians of both political parties support these dangerous mines? Because **money talks, while ethics walks**.”

You can view the entire speech here: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=prvzH0nLm0M&feature=youtu.be **As Richard continues his historic march towards Washington, we hope you will consider making a contribution today.** Our campaign is powered by the American people, not PACs or special interest groups. Every dollar we raise will help us get Richard's message out to the voters. [](https://www.painterminnesota.com/contribute?e=876d7de1c5ec40075e79a5a0e587a9e3&utm_source=painterminnesota&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=post_convention&n=2) Thank you for your consideration, Painter For Minnesota

| | Friends,
The June 5th Republican Primary election is tomorrow, and I want to thank each and every person who has helped my campaign for reelection be successful.
This seat in Congress belongs to the people who live and work in Alabama's Second Congressional District, and I have been humbled to serve as your representative. I've also been excited to be part of the conservative momentum over the last year and a half. Our unified Republican government has really accomplished a lot, and we have a historic opportunity to deliver even more positive change for you.
I’m asking for your support tomorrow so we can keep the momentum going. Throughout the campaign season, I've run on my conservative Republican record. Here are just a few things that remain at the top of my very long list of priorities:

* Alabama's Second District has a significant military footprint, and it is my job to ensure that our Armed Forces are properly supported -- both for the sake of our national security and for the critical missions that take place at Fort Rucker and Maxwell-Gunter Air Force Base. I will continue to use my seat on the Defense Appropriations Subcommittee to ensure that our military is well funded so that the men and women who serve our country have the tools they need when we send them into harm's way.

* I believe our veterans represent the very best of this country, and AL-02 has a large veteran population. It is our responsibility to provide them the absolute best care available, and it's no secret that we often fall short of this responsibility. During my time in Congress, we have made real progress towards improving the VA, which is a deeply flawed, broken bureaucracy. Our work isn't over -- not even close. I will always fight for proper care for our nation's veterans.

* As you well know, agriculture is the largest employer in AL-02. I know how important it is that we get farm policy right on behalf of the hardworking farmers across our district and state. I will always fight for agriculture policy that better equips farmers to do their jobs and doesn't stand in their way. I will continue to use my seat on the Appropriations Committee to ensure that these important programs are funded each year.

* As I've traveled throughout the district this campaign season to meet with the people I represent, I've been told time and time again that the most important issue to many people here in our district is border security. I completely agree. That's why I voted to use every tool available to enhance border security -- including putting a down payment on construction of the border wall. I have always and will continue to advocate for smart immigration policy that puts the safety of Americans first.

* Last but certainly not least, I remain unapologetically pro-life. I believe life begins at conception and that our laws and policies should assign greater protection to life at every stage. I will always use my voice in Congress to speak out for those who cannot yet speak for themselves.

Thank you for allowing me to serve you in Congress. I strive each day to be the very best representative of our conservative beliefs that I can be. I humbly ask for your support tomorrow. Remind your friends and family to get out and exercise their right to vote, too! The polls open at 7:00 a.m. You can find your polling location [here](http://teamroby.mailmaverick.com/lt.php?s=28c51fb5ce169770ebe8202fcd9bdf95&i=103A125A9A3707).
God bless you, and may God continue to bless this great country.

\- Martha

| | Friends, In the month of June our newsletter will be published biweekly instead of each Monday. On primary election day (June 5th) our Hattiesburg headquarters opens, AND we will host a Watch Party that evening as votes are tallied and the primary elections victors are decided. We hope that our Hub City supporters will join us as we await the news of who will be our opponent in November. Please come by and join us at the Hattiesburg headquarters located at 2018 Hardy Street.On Wednesday, June 6th, the general election officially begins and we plan to come out swinging. There is feeling among the Mississippi Republican party that this election is in the bag because the establishment candidate “represents the values of the people of South Mississippi.” Imagine that! Your voice is already spoken for, no need to consult with you about policies that are affecting you and your family! Folks, that is not what elected representation is about and I plan to stand before my staff, my supporters, and the press and kindly inform the Republican party that PEOPLE ALWAYS HAVE A SAY and that YOUR VOICE IS NOT ALREADY SPOKEN FOR IN THIS ELECTION! I believe you have to earn representation, and I hope that I am earning yours. Yard signs are ready to go out! Stop by one of our headquarters during office hours to pick yours up. We are asking for a $5 donation when you pick up a sign (unless you have already made a campaign donation.) Biloxi HQ - M-F from 8:30 a.m. to 5:30 p.m., CLOSED WEDNESDAYHattiesburg HQ - Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday from 8:30 a.m. to 5:30 p.m. Upcoming events: ALA (American Legion Auxiliary) Magnolia Girls State - June 3-7 at The University of Southern Mississippi - Representative Anderson will be a guest speaker. Dates to Remember: Tuesday, June 5th \- PRIMARY ELECTION DAY 7 a.m. to 7 p.m. (note if you are in line at 7 p.m., you still have the right to place your vote - do not leave!) HATTIESBURG HEADQUARTER OPENING 8:30 a.m. to 5:30 p.m. ELECTION NIGHT WATCH PARTY AT HATTIESBURG HQ 7-10 Wednesday June 6th \- POST-PRIMARY PRESS CONFERENCE - “GAME ON!” BILOXI HQ 11-11:30 a.m. #Onward,Jeramey Anderson for Congress

On primary election day (June 5th) our Hatti | | | | | | | | | Friends, In the month of June our newsletter will be published biweekly instead of each Monday. On primary election day (June 5th) our Hattiesburg headquarters opens, AND we will host a Watch Party that evening as votes are tallied and the primary elections victors are decided. We hope that our Hub City supporters will join us as we await the news of who will be our opponent in November. Please come by and join us at the Hattiesburg headquarters located at 2018 Hardy Street.On Wednesday, June 6th, the general election officially begins and we plan to come out swinging. There is feeling among the Mississippi Republican party that this election is in the bag because the establishment candidate “represents the values of the people of South Mississippi.” Imagine that! Your voice is already spoken for, no need to consult with you about policies that are affecting you and your family! Folks, that is not what elected representation is about and I plan to stand before my staff, my supporters, and the press and kindly inform the Republican party that PEOPLE ALWAYS HAVE A SAY and that YOUR VOICE IS NOT ALREADY SPOKEN FOR IN THIS ELECTION! I believe you have to earn representation, and I hope that I am earning yours. Yard signs are ready to go out! Stop by one of our headquarters during office hours to pick yours up. We are asking for a $5 donation when you pick up a sign (unless you have already made a campaign donation.) Biloxi HQ - M-F from 8:30 a.m. to 5:30 p.m., CLOSED WEDNESDAYHattiesburg HQ - Tuesday, Wednesday, and Thursday from 8:30 a.m. to 5:30 p.m. Upcoming events: ALA (American Legion Auxiliary) Magnolia Girls State - June 3-7 at The University of Southern Mississippi - Representative Anderson will be a guest speaker. Dates to Remember: Tuesday, June 5th \- PRIMARY ELECTION DAY 7 a.m. to 7 p.m. (note if you are in line at 7 p.m., you still have the right to place your vote - do not leave!) HATTIESBURG HEADQUARTER OPENING 8:30 a.m. to 5:30 p.m. ELECTION NIGHT WATCH PARTY AT HATTIESBURG HQ 7-10 Wednesday June 6th \- POST-PRIMARY PRESS CONFERENCE - “GAME ON!” BILOXI HQ 11-11:30 a.m. #Onward,Jeramey Anderson for Congress | |

body:

| | Derek,

**[Democrats are taking 2018 very seriously.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13f6/3e0906/64d02313/3e342e33/670773875/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+Democrats+are+taking+2018+very+seriously&utm_campaign=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate&source=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate")**

We need to do well in every corner of Virginia and empower Virginians to keep their state blue by re-electing Tim to the Senate.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13f6/3e0906/64d02313/3e342e32/670773875/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+Irsquom+reaching+out+on+behalf+of+Tim+Ka&utm_campaign=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate&source=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate")

They're hungry for Democratic leadership because they know Democrats have their back. They know Democrats share their values. And they're ready to fight for those values at the ballot box. _That's what this election is all about._

**[We need to elect fighters:](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13f6/3e0906/64d02313/3e342e31/670773875/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+We+need+to+elect+fighters&utm_campaign=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate&source=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate")**

The best way to fight back against Donald Trump is to elect Democrats like Tim Kaine who stand up to him every day. The Tim Kaine I know puts working families first and never backs down from a fight.

**[We need to unite as Democrats:](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13f6/3e0906/64d02313/3e342e30/670773875/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+We+need+to+unite+as+Democrats&utm_campaign=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate&source=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate")**

When I was elected DNC Chair I said that unity would be our greatest strength and Donald Trump's worst nightmare. That's as true today as it's ever been. When we're united around our shared values and organizing for fighters like Tim Kaine, we're unstoppable.

**[We need to compete everywhere:](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13f6/3e0906/64d02313/3e342e37/670773875/VEsD/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+We+need+to+compete+everywhere&utm_campaign=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate&source=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate")**

We've seen incredible enthusiasm for Democrats across the country, even in deep-red districts that Trump won by double-digits in 2016. Look no further than Virginia, a critical battleground state that many pundits said Democrats would lose in 2017. Instead, we elected a Democratic governor by nearly 9 points and gained 15 seats in the House of Delegates. When we organize and lead with our values, we can compete everywhere.

This year we have the opportunity to build on those victories. And if we want to turn more areas of the country blue, we need a program that empowers everyone to get involved, knock on doors, and talk to their neighbors about just how important this election is to our future.

[Tim is building that kind of program.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13f6/3e0906/64d02313/3e342e36/670773875/VEsA/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=6+-+Tim+is+building+that+kind+of+program&utm_campaign=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate&source=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate")

**[We need to show we're fighting for everyone:](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13f6/3e0906/64d02313/3e342e35/670773875/VEsB/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=7+-+We+need+to+show+were+fighting+for+everyo&utm_campaign=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate&source=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate")**

Every Republican running against Tim would be a rubber-stamp for Donald Trump in the Senate. They support his attempts to take away health care from millions and his disastrous economic agenda that has put wealthy corporations ahead of working families. They've echoed his messages of hatred and bigotry, while embracing the lies and conspiracy theories this administration peddles every day.

Tim knows that diversity and inclusion are America's strengths. He knows that we're at our best when we choose compassion over cruelty, and when we work to expand opportunities for everyone.

**[We can't take anything for granted:](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13f6/3e0906/64d02313/3e342e34/670773875/VEsO/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=8+-+We+cant+take+anything+for+granted&utm_campaign=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate&source=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate")**

A recent poll has any generic Republican opponent within just three points of beating Tim. That's not something we can take lightly. Tim needs us to stand with him. [His fundraising numbers go public at the end of this month, and we have the chance to show just how much grassroots support Tim has across Virginia.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13f6/3e0906/64d02313/3e342e0b/670773875/VEsP/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=9+-+His+fundraising+numbers+go+public+at+the&utm_campaign=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate&source=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate") **[Will you chip in to Tim's campaign today to make sure his opponents know that we are taking this race seriously?](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13f6/3e0906/64d02313/3e342e0a/670773875/VEsHBQ/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?refcode=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate&amount=25&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=10+-+Will+you+chip+in+to+Timrsquos+campaign+t&utm_campaign=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate&source=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate")** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [**DONATE $5**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f13f6/3e0906/64d02313/3e342e09/670773875/VEsHBA/ "http://secure.actblue.com/donate/tk-2018?express_lane=true&amount=5&refcode=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate_express_lane_5&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=11+-+DONATE+5&utm_campaign=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate&source=20180604_1_FR_TP_TP-Surrogate")

name: Regina Bateson
subject: the last day we’ll ever have
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bateson for Congress
body:
Peter,
Today is the last day we’ll be able to knock on doors, dial the phones, and change minds before tomorrow’s primary.
We cannot waste it.
We are still $2,341 away from our pre-primary fundraising goal for voter outreach. Every last bit of money will go directly into turning out voters tomorrow. Will you donate to make sure we can reach every voter? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_primary?refcode=RB_EM_FR_WL_180604_1_6&amount=25&recurring=AUTO]
This money will go straight into voter outreach, GOTV, and responses to the shady, negative Facebook ads that have been attacking our movement. We need to reach this goal in order to have our best shot at winning what looks like a VERY close election tomorrow.
I am so honored to have gone on this journey with you. I don’t want it to end until we beat Tom McClintock and give this district the representation it deserves. Will you help us get there by contributing to our pre-primary outreach right away? >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/rb_primary?refcode=RB_EM_FR_WL_180604_1_6&amount=25&recurring=AUTO]

_President Trump is threatening Special Counsel Robert Mueller _again_._
Protect the independent investigation
[SIGN THE PETITION](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6772/51dbcc2a/7bb86ac/3a2e433/301060057/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbV8yMDE4MDYwNF9zb19uZF9WMVMyIn0=/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/s/protect-robert-mueller?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&refcode=em_20180604_so_nd_V1S2&source=em_20180604_so_nd_V1S2")

The president is not above the law.

In a democracy, we should all be able to agree on that. But this morning, President Trump took to Twitter, claiming that the appointment of the Special Counsel is unconstitutional (it's not) and that he has the right to pardon himself (he doesn't).

We as voters have not just the right but the responsibility to know whether foreign agents had an undue influence on the 2016 presidential election -- **nothing less than our democracy is on the line, and we need to keep demanding answers.**

[**_Special Counsel Mueller 's independent, nonpartisan investigation is critical to the future of our democracy, and it is our civic duty to protect it._**](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6772/51dbcc2a/7bb86ac/3a2e433/301060057/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZHU1ZKVFZFNUJUVVVsSlE9PSI6IiIsIkpTVk1RVk5VVGtGTlJTVWwiOiIiLCJKU1ZGVFVGSlRDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVmFTVkFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2IiwiZTNzZ2NtVm1ZMjlrWlNCOWZRPT0iOiJlbV8yMDE4MDYwNF9zb19uZF9WMVMyIn0=/ "https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/s/protect-robert-mueller?firstname=&lastname=&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&refcode=em_20180604_so_nd_V1S2&source=em_20180604_so_nd_V1S2")

Senator Bob Casey has been relentless in protecting the independent investigation, and in November, we'll send him back to the Senate to continue to defend our democracy. But we can't wait until then to make our voices heard.

body:
| Good morning Friend, I am all smiles this morning. I am happy to report that last week, we destroyed our goal of 1,000 online donors by the end of the month. Over 1,000 people made a donation to the campaign! I am so thankful for everyone that stepped up to make a donation - it means so much to me. And thank you to everyone that helped spread the word. Last month, we witnessed exponential growth in our campaign’s support. The debate victory, the polling, phonebanking, our first ads, fundraising, all of the media generated... Our campaign is picking up major traction in Missouri. We are on the path to victory. I can’t thank you enough, Friend. We couldn’t do this without you. Here is the campaign update: **Conservative Rising Stars in the US Senate Election:** Our campaign was featured in an article on Town Hall regarding some of the most promising conservatives running for U.S. Senate. Here’s what they said about our campaign: _“Austin Petersen is a 37-year-old liberty Rising Star from Missouri. A 2016 Libertarian Presidential candidate, he has since changed to the Republican party due to his pro-life conservative views._ _Petersen is a self-made businessman, wears jeans with blazers, has a sharp sense of humor, and makes selfie videos to explain his political positions. He is the most modern and accessible candidate on our list. Petersen is a revolutionary Republican candidate, having motivated thousands of young people to fight for conservative values, something that other Republicans have struggled to achieve.”_ You can read the article by [**clicking here.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/conservative_rising_stars_in_the_us_senate_election?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=060418_update&n=1) **The Annie Frey show & The No Gimmicks podcast:** Recently, I joined the Annie Frey show and the No Gimmicks podcast to discuss recent polling, Claire McCaskill, abortion, and the campaign. You can listen to the Annie Frey show’s segment by [**clicking here.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2F971talk.radio.com%2Fblogs%2Fannie-frey-show%2Faustin-petersen-polls-religion-and-abortion&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=060418_update&n=2) And you can listen to the No Gimmicks podcast by [**clicking here.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/r?u=https%3A%2F%2Fsoundcloud.com%2Fthenogimmickspodcast%2Ftngp-ep-90-austin-petersen&e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=060418_update&n=3) **Austin Petersen Crushes Dem Claire McCaskill and Republican Rival Josh Hawley in New Poll:** Ahhh the Gravis Marketing poll. The gift that keeps on giving. It seems like everyday another news outlet picks up on the news about our poll. It has been covered in The Blaze, Newsmax, Breitbart, NOQ Report, Springfield News Leader, and Western Journal. The Daily Wire wrote an article regarding the polling results that demonstrate I am the best candidate to defeat Claire McCaskill in November. I also had the chance to do a small interview with them. [**You can click here to read the whole article.**](https://www.austinpetersen.com/austin_petersen_crushes_dem_claire_mccaskill_and_republican_rival_josh_hawley_in_new_poll?e=ccccbfabdb12429692987ee06467ce16&utm_source=austinpetersen&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=060418_update&n=4) Thanks again, Friend! Austin Petersen

Over 1,000 people made a donation to the campaign! I am so thankful for everyone that stepped up to make a donation - it means so much to me. And thank you to everyone that helped spread the word. Last month, we witnessed exponential growth in our campaign’s support. The debate victory, the polling, phonebanking, our first ads, fundraising, all of the media generated... Our campaign is picking up major traction in Missouri. We are on the path to victory. I can’t thank you enough, Friend. We couldn’t do this without you. Here is the campaign update: Conservative Rising Stars in the US Senate Election: Our campaign was featured in an article on Town Hall regarding some of the most promising conservatives running for U.S. Senate. Here’s what they said about our campaign: “Austin Petersen is a 37-year-old liberty Rising Star from Missouri. A 2016 Libertarian Presidential candidate, he has since changed to the Republican party due to his pro-life conservative views. Petersen is a self-made businessman, wears jeans with blazers, has a sharp sense of humor, and makes selfie videos to explain his political positions. He is the most modern and accessible candidate on our list. Petersen is a revolutionary Republican candidate, having motivated thousands of young people to fight for conservative values, something that other Republicans have struggled to achieve.” You can read the article by The Annie Frey show & The No Gimmicks podcast: Recently, I joined the Annie Frey show and the No Gimmicks podcast to discuss recent polling, Claire McCaskill, abortion, and the campaign. You can listen to the Annie Frey show’s segment by And you can listen to the No Gimmicks podcast by Austin Petersen Crushes Dem Claire McCaskill and Republican Rival Josh Hawley in New Poll: Ahhh the Gravis Marketing poll. Friend,
What a way to open Pride Month.
You've probably heard that the US Supreme Court ruled in favor of the Colorado baker who refused to make a wedding cake for a same-sex couple.
**Decisions like this underscore the urgency of flipping the House in 2018.** At least one branch of government should stand up for our brothers and sisters in the LGBT community.
[**I am counting on your support to win in November. Your generous donation is critical to our effort to halt the bitterly divisive conservative agenda.**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Sn7QzJ6lMcyVR4gCZcitx7t64gi3QDC0KyIyWpv0hbI=/3wxhqohf2T1p5bZgCxvMnnbSVaZsNxp1vg47w1V1bfs=?refcode=june-4-show-your-pride)
June should be a month to honor LGBT accomplishments.**I spent a postcard-perfect Saturday with thousands of others at the second annual Naples Pride event, celebrating diversity and tolerance.**
There was no sign of my Republican opponent, who votes in lockstep with a president who wants to ban transgender soldiers from serving in the US military.
[**We need to embrace our brothers and sisters in the LGBT community, not ostracize them. Can you chip in $10 or more to help me push back against the bigotry, intolerance and hate that warp today 's Republican Party?**](https://act.myngp.com/el/Sn7QzJ6lMcyVR4gCZcitx7t64gi3QDC0KyIyWpv0hbI=/3wxhqohf2T1p5bZgCxvMnnbSVaZsNxp1vg47w1V1bfs=?refcode=june-4-show-your-pride)
Thank you and happy Pride Month,
**\- Mary**

| | Peter,

Thank you so much for joining our campaign.

I am running to give the people of California's 25th District a voice, to harness the unprecedented level of energy we have been witnessing, and to move our country in a direction that aligns with _**our**_ values--not Donald Trump's values.

I promise to be a champion for well-paying jobs, Medicare for All, quality schools, and clean air and water.

**Please take a moment to like and share us on Facebook and follow us on Twitter.**

**[Like us on Facebook](https://secure.bryancaforio.com/page/m/1d3843b5/169f49de/342cf700/3386468e/1476068216/VEsE/ "https://www.facebook.com/BryanCaforio/?refcode=INTRO2")**
**[Follow @BryanCaforio](https://secure.bryancaforio.com/page/m/1d3843b5/169f49de/342cf700/3386468d/1476068216/VEsF/ "https://twitter.com/BryanCaforio?refcode=INTRO2")**
My parents were both public school teachers, and I saw firsthand the difference a good teacher can make in giving kids an opportunity to succeed. Everything I have, and everything I am, is due to the fact that I went to good public schools and was given the opportunity to get ahead.

Unfortunately, because of misguided policies coming out of Congress today, too many people don't get that same opportunity.

We can do better. The American dream is founded on everyone having the opportunity to succeed. With your help, we can keep that promise alive.

Thank you so much for your support.

\- Bryan |
---
The son of two public school teachers, **Bryan Caforio is a Yale Law School graduate and former federal law clerk who will use his skills and experience to hold Trump accountable.** Bryan will fight to pass Medicare for All, protect our environment, and defend Dreamers. He's the progressive candidate who's been endorsed by dozens of local officials, labor unions, and the majority of delegates at the California Democratic Party Convention.

We're running a grassroots campaign that relies on getting the message out to supporters like you. ---

Peter,

The numbers don't lie: The blue wave will be powered by women.

So far, primaries have been held in 147 House districts, and women have been the nominees in _**43 percent**_ of the Democratic contests.

That's an excellent start. But 19 states and D.C. have primary elections in June -- and we need to keep up the support for pro-choice Democratic women in competitive races.

**[Donate $3 to help pro-choice Democratic women get through their primaries and bring home big wins for Democrats on Election Day.](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c45de/24c69fd9/1adb86fb3/1881ea23/4116902636/VEsE/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180604_email_WomenWave?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=2+-+Donate+3+to+help+prochoice+Democratic+wo&utm_campaign=WQEFER07N_digital_email_20180604_WomenWave_inact&source=WQEFER07N_digital_email_20180604_WomenWave_inact")**

Unsurprisingly, the numbers on the Republican side are fairly weak.

In the primaries held so far, just 7 percent of all the Republican House nominees have been women.

That's because there just isn't a Republican equivalent of EMILY's List -- we're _the_ organization for women in politics, and our support really does make a difference.

Five months out from Election Day, we've already helped 13 of our House candidates through their primaries, and two more are heading to runoffs.

But we still have 36 House women facing primaries -- not to mention dozens of other women running for state and local office, too!

**Donate $3 to help even more pro-choice Democratic women make it through their primaries and defeat Republicans in November:**

**[https://secure.emilyslist.org/Elect-Women-Blue-Wave](https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/m/118c45de/24c69fd9/1adb86fb3/1881ea5c/4116902636/VEsF/ "https://secure.emilyslist.org/page/contribute/20180604_email_WomenWave?utm_medium=email&utm_source=emilyslist&utm_content=3+-+httpssecureemilyslistorgElectWomenBlueWa&utm_campaign=WQEFER07N_digital_email_20180604_WomenWave_inact&source=WQEFER07N_digital_email_20180604_WomenWave_inact")**

Thanks -- and go team!

Emily Cain
Executive Director, EMILY's List

disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jessica Morse for Congress, a grassroots campaign
body:
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/LSmFaSnzxCtT_Txw5QYJq67UAdje2ZlXPSliEuxM_s8=/bZPcfzuBE4U8jKtDMQWX8LKrmfFfYewZ5vuvDZUzMwo=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180604_JM_finalcase_all_logo)
On the eve of the election, people keep asking if I'm nervous. To a degree, of course I am, but my overwhelming feeling is gratitude.
I am so grateful for everyone who helped my vision of a positive, issue-focused campaign become a reality.
Your generous donations enabled us to hire an incredible team, open three field offices and mobilize hundreds of volunteers throughout the district to uplift and inspire our community to vote.
**We are sprinting across the finish line and could use your continued help in these last 24 hours. Chip in now to help us give this everything we 've got.**

_**[Express Donate: $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/LSmFaSnzxCtT_Txw5QYJq67UAdje2ZlXPSliEuxM_s8=/7HdZjn59wuXIf2lj2pXKhVfWblgJr0xpAc2ARw8CbNI=?express_lane=true&amount=25&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180604_JM_finalcase_all_express-lane-25)**_

_**[Express Donate: $100](https://act.myngp.com/el/LSmFaSnzxCtT_Txw5QYJq67UAdje2ZlXPSliEuxM_s8=/7HdZjn59wuXIf2lj2pXKhVfWblgJr0xpAc2ARw8CbNI=?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180604_JM_finalcase_all_express-lane-100)**_
_**[Or, donate another amount](https://act.myngp.com/el/LSmFaSnzxCtT_Txw5QYJq67UAdje2ZlXPSliEuxM_s8=/7HdZjn59wuXIf2lj2pXKhVfWblgJr0xpAc2ARw8CbNI=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180604_JM_finalcase_all_express-lane-other)**_
Every day, I'm out knocking on doors having face-to-face conversations with our neighbors--and getting daily reminders of why we need new representation in Congress.
In Placerville, I met a Gold Star mom who hugged me and told me how grateful she was to have someone running who understood her family's sacrifice.
In Truckee, I met a dad who eagerly introduced me to his teenage daughter and her friends--he wanted them to see a woman running for Congress.
In Sonora, a man asked me what I was going to do about prisons. When I told him we needed to focus on getting people the tools, support, and training to get back on their feet, his eyes filled with tears. He had been in prison and had never heard someone talking about prisoners with compassion and empathy.
I am running for Congress because our community deserves an advocate and a partner to fight for our kids, to fight for our troops, and to support those in our community who've struggled.
[_**Tomorrow night, we can get one step closer to achieving that --with your help. Make your final donation of the primary now. **_](https://act.myngp.com/el/LSmFaSnzxCtT_Txw5QYJq67UAdje2ZlXPSliEuxM_s8=/7HdZjn59wuXIf2lj2pXKhVfWblgJr0xpAc2ARw8CbNI=?refcode=email_ngp_fr_20180604_JM_finalcase_all_l1)
Thank you again. It's my honor to stand with you all.
Jessica

name: Tim Ryan
subject: A Democratic Party that works for working people
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tim Ryan for Congress
body:
I believe that if Democrats campaign on a bold economic platform, we can win anywhere. And I mean anywhere. | |
---
Folks, **I believe that if Democrats campaign on a bold economic platform, we can win anywhere. And I mean _anywhere_. ** Wherever I go -- from Birmingham, Alabama in the Deep South to the Midwest and my hometown of Youngstown, Ohio -- people are hungry for a message that speaks to working people: raising wages, establishing universal health care, writing a fair tax code, and creating high-quality jobs that can't be outsourced. [If you're ready to help spread our bold, comprehensive economic message in 2018 and beyond, add your name >>](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92a9/5486deaa/28bae64c/dcc17d3/3695782752/VEsH/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/sign-on-democrats-should-campaign-on-a-bold-economic-platform") [Sign on ->](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92a9/5486deaa/28bae64c/dcc17d3/3695782752/VEsE/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/sign-on-democrats-should-campaign-on-a-bold-economic-platform") Let's be clear: President Trump has broken his campaign promises to working people. He has tried to take healthcare away from millions of Americans, given huge tax breaks to multinational corporations that ship jobs overseas, and stacked his administration with billionaires and corporate lobbyists. I don't have to tell you that he continues to use fear and division to distract us from broken promises. We can't accept that. Resisting the President's ill-advised policies must be a priority, but we can't just be anti-Trump. **To truly turn this county around, Democrats must proudly campaign on a positive, forward-looking economic message that speaks to every American.** [Add your name if you agree.](http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/m/d7a92a9/5486deaa/28bae64c/dcc17d3/3695782752/VEsF/ "http://action.timryanforcongress.com/page/s/sign-on-democrats-should-campaign-on-a-bold-economic-platform") Thank you, and thanks for being on Team Ryan, \-- Tim

# Meet Tim Ryan
Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since.
| |

clean_body: I believe that if Democrats campaign on a bold economic platform, we can win anywhere. And I mean anywhere. | | Folks, I believe that if Democrats campaign on a bold economic platform, we can win anywhere. And I mean anywhere. Wherever I go -- from Birmingham, Alabama in the Deep South to the Midwest and my hometown of Youngstown, Ohio -- people are hungry for a message that speaks to working people: raising wages, establishing universal health care, writing a fair tax code, and creating high-quality jobs that can't be outsourced. "" "" Let's be clear: President Trump has broken his campaign promises to working people. He has tried to take healthcare away from millions of Americans, given huge tax breaks to multinational corporations that ship jobs overseas, and stacked his administration with billionaires and corporate lobbyists. I don't have to tell you that he continues to use fear and division to distract us from broken promises. We can't accept that. Resisting the President's ill-advised policies must be a priority, but we can't just be anti-Trump. To truly turn this county around, Democrats must proudly campaign on a positive, forward-looking economic message that speaks to every American. "" Thank you, and thanks for being on Team Ryan, \-- Tim Update Email Preferences "" "" | | Meet Tim Ryan Tim Ryan is a champion for working families in Ohio's 13th District and is known for challenging both parties to do more to rebuild the middle class. Tim believes that every hardworking family deserves a good job, a quality education for their kids, affordable healthcare, and the security of knowing they can retire with dignity. Tim was elected to the U.S. House of Representatives in 2002 and has been fighting for working people ever since. | | Tim Ryan for Congress** P.O. Regina
